summary: Iteration 49: Role-Based Access Control Tests PASSED. Verified user roles (CEO vs USER), CEO endpoint protection, system account deletion protection, and frontend module visibility based on role.
seed_data_creation: System accounts seeded via ensure_system_account() on server startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role system fully tested and working. Both system accounts (teste@teste.com as USER, garcia.rapha2@gmail.com as CEO) are protected and cannot be deleted. CEO endpoints return 403 for non-CEO users. Frontend properly hides CEO module from regular users and redirects non-CEO users to /venue/home when accessing /ceo directly.

backend_api_tests.login_test_user_returns_user_role: ✅ PASSED - Login with teste@teste.com returns role: USER
backend_api_tests.login_ceo_user_returns_ceo_role: ✅ PASSED - Login with garcia.rapha2@gmail.com returns role: CEO
backend_api_tests.auth_me_returns_role_for_test_user: ✅ PASSED - GET /api/auth/me returns role: USER for test user
backend_api_tests.auth_me_returns_role_for_ceo_user: ✅ PASSED - GET /api/auth/me returns role: CEO for CEO user
backend_api_tests.ceo_health_returns_403_for_regular_user: ✅ PASSED - GET /api/ceo/health returns 403 for non-CEO user
backend_api_tests.ceo_health_returns_200_for_ceo_user: ✅ PASSED - GET /api/ceo/health returns 200 for CEO user
backend_api_tests.delete_test_user_returns_403: ✅ PASSED - DELETE test user account returns 403 (system account protection)
backend_api_tests.delete_ceo_user_returns_403: ✅ PASSED - DELETE CEO user account returns 403 (system account protection)
backend_api_tests.multiple_ceo_endpoints_blocked_for_regul: ✅ PASSED - 9/9 CEO endpoints blocked for regular user
backend_api_tests.multiple_ceo_endpoints_work_for_ceo_user: ✅ PASSED - 9/9 CEO endpoints accessible for CEO user

frontend_ui_tests.regular_user_ceo_module_hidden: ✅ PASSED - CEO module NOT visible in modules dropdown for teste@teste.com
frontend_ui_tests.ceo_user_ceo_module_visible: ✅ PASSED - CEO module IS visible in modules dropdown for garcia.rapha2@gmail.com
frontend_ui_tests.regular_user_redirect_from_ceo_page: ✅ PASSED - Regular user navigating to /ceo gets redirected to /venue/home
frontend_ui_tests.ceo_user_can_access_ceo_page: ✅ PASSED - CEO user can access /ceo page with full CEO Dashboard
frontend_ui_tests.all_other_modules_accessible_for_regular: ✅ PASSED - TAP, Table, Kitchen, Manager, Pulse modules all accessible for regular user
